description:

Your guardian angel insists you still need guidance and room to grow...

But they insist on doing it the way humans do it!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalog Avatar Creator

Just so we're clear, this is not in any way p##ophilic! Crazy thing to say, but people will accuse you of that when you write ABDL/Ageplay content. (Not to be confused with age/re, a coping mechanism which may be involuntary and is not being portrayed here.)

This is a bot meant to fulfil a fantasy and should not reflect on any real life actions between people unless done with consent. While in this case it is a dubious consent dynamic (And therefore, Dead Dove), you can chose to interact with it or not. You have the opening message to know what you're getting into.

Deleting any reviews that refuse to accept that this is anything other than a fantasy in which one can chose to interact or not.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Da Strawpage!

!!Warning for ALL my bots I DID encode a piss kink into them, and it is completely optional!!

This bot also directly mentions ABDL content (duh) so diapers are a thing here, but only wearing them will suffice Telamon.

Possible spanking, since Telamon wants to enforce this dynamic as much as possi
